row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward movement along a curved road path with slight rightward drift.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: A white car ahead maintains forward trajectory; pedestrians on the sidewalk remain relatively static.

semantic.scene_summary: Urban environment with multi-lane road, guard booths, barriers, trees, and buildings. A white sedan is visible ahead under an overpass.
semantic.visibility_notes: All objects are clearly visible with natural lighting and sharp detail. No occlusions obscure critical elements.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward motion of ego vehicle; white car ahead moves consistently without abrupt changes. Pedestrians walk steadily along sidewalk.
logical.object_continuity: All key objects remain continuously visible throughout frames. No sudden appearances or disappearances.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry, building facades, and overhead structures maintain consistent spatial relationships across frames.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward steadily, following the road curve while maintaining safe distance from ahead vehicle.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards detected. Road ahead is clear except for distant white car which appears to be moving at similar speed.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar urban scene layout but with noticeable degradation in object clarity and texture fidelity. White sedan and pedestrians present but less defined.
semantic.visibility_notes: Objects exhibit reduced sharpness and texture detail compared to reference. Some elements appear slightly distorted or simplified.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Forward motion appears smooth but with minor jitter in object boundaries. White car movement is consistent but lacks fine-grained detail.
logical.object_continuity: Key objects remain present throughout sequence but show slight positional instability and boundary flickering.
logical.structure_continuity: Overall scene structure preserved but with subtle warping and loss of precise geometric alignment in some areas.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward with apparent steady motion, though visual artifacts may affect perception accuracy.
decision.risk_context: Reduced visual fidelity may impair downstream decision-making systems' ability to accurately assess distances and object states.

missing_or_weakened_elements: fine texture details on vehicles and buildings
newly_introduced_elements: slight geometric distortions in structural elements
artifacts_or_instabilities: subtle positional jitter in dynamic objects
